title: Method for manufacturing a display panel
abstract: A method of manufacturing a display panel includes forming a pixel defining layer defining an opening exposing an upper surface of a pixel electrode on a substrate on which the pixel electrode is formed, providing an auxiliary solvent into the opening, performing a liquid-repellent treatment on an upper surface of the pixel defining layer, removing the auxiliary solvent from the opening and providing an organic composition including an organic solvent into the opening.
claims: 1. A method of manufacturing a display panel, the method comprising: forming a pixel defining layer defining an opening exposing an upper surface of a pixel electrode on a substrate on which the pixel electrode is formed; providing an auxiliary solvent into the opening; performing a liquid-repellent treatment on an upper surface of the pixel defining layer; removing the auxiliary solvent from the opening; and providing an organic composition including an organic solvent into the opening.
